items.title: Military Working Dog Kennel Hunter Army Airfield, Savannah, Georgia
items.plainEnglish: It reads like animal logistics inside a federal procurement record. It may be perfectly reasonable — the weird part is seeing it as an official line item.
items.officialTitle: Military Working Dog Kennel Hunter Army Airfield, Savannah, Georgia
items.displayTitle: Barracks, but for dogs with jobs
items.punchline: Officially, it is a military working-dog kennel. Unofficially, it is base housing for employees who can smell contraband.
